tool_args.label: Malcolm X Blvd Transit & Traffic Improvements – CB3 Transportation Committee Feb 2020

payload.title: Malcolm X Blvd Transit & Traffic Improvements
payload.description: Presented to Brooklyn Community Board 3 Transportation Committee on February 11, 2020. Covers B46 Select Bus Service background, 2019 project on Fulton St to Atlantic Ave, and proposal for Chauncey St to Fulton St southbound bus lane.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: NYC Department of Transportation (NYC DOT)

payload.entity_name: New York City Department of Transportation
payload.description: Presented the Malcolm X Blvd Transit & Traffic Improvements to Brooklyn Community Board 3 Transportation Committee

tool_args.label: Brooklyn Community Board 3

payload.description: Transportation Committee audience for the Malcolm X Blvd Transit & Traffic Improvements presentation

tool_args.label: MTA

payload.description: MTA logo appears on presentation; B46 Select Bus Service is an MTA service

tool_args.label: B46 Select Bus Service

payload.description: Brooklyn's busiest bus route (38,000 daily riders). Connects Bed-Stuy to 3 4 A C J Z + 30 bus routes. Upgraded to Select Bus Service in 2016. Upgraded to articulated buses in January 2020.

tool_args.label: B46 Local

payload.description: B46 Local service referenced in the presentation map legend as 'Proposed B46 Local'

tool_args.label: Malcolm X Blvd

payload.description: Corridor identified as a 2019 Better Buses priority project. Segment from Chauncey St to Fulton St is the focus of the proposed southbound bus lane.

tool_args.label: Utica Avenue

payload.description: Utica Avenue corridor identified as part of the Malcolm X Blvd / Utica Ave 2019 priority project. Segment from Fulton St to Atlantic Ave had bus lane implemented in 2019.

tool_args.label: Malcolm X Blvd / Utica Ave Transit Improvements

payload.project_name: Malcolm X Blvd / Utica Ave Transit Improvements
payload.status: 2019 priority project; Fulton St to Atlantic Ave segment implemented July-Dec 2019; Chauncey St to Fulton St proposed for Spring 2020
payload.description: Better Buses Action Plan 2019 priority project identified due to high ridership, slow bus speeds, unreliable travel times, and high volumes of buses. Includes a southbound bus lane on Malcolm X Blvd from Chauncey St to Fulton St, and a previously implemented southbound bus lane on Malcolm X Blvd from Fulton St to Atlantic Ave.

tool_args.label: Fulton St to Atlantic Ave southbound bus lane

payload.location_text: Malcolm X Blvd, Fulton St to Atlantic Ave, Brooklyn
payload.description: 1 block of southbound bus lane, photo enforced. Implemented July-Dec 2019. Overnight parking preserved. Cross-section: 11' Bus Lane / Off-peak Parking Lane, 10' Travel Lane, 10' Travel Lane, 9' Parking Lane, 40' East Sidewalk.

normalized_location.raw_text: Malcolm X Blvd, Fulton St to Atlantic Ave, Brooklyn

tool_args.label: Chauncey St to Fulton St southbound bus lane (proposed)

payload.location_text: Malcolm X Blvd, Chauncey St to Fulton St, Brooklyn
payload.description: Proposed curbside bus lane, southbound only. Allows buses to bypass traffic and access the bus stop. Improves traffic flow. Overnight parking remains. Cross-section: 11' Bus Lane / Off-peak Parking Lane, 10' Travel Lane, 10' Travel Lane, 9' Parking Lane, 40' East Sidewalk.

normalized_location.raw_text: Malcolm X Blvd, Chauncey St to Fulton St, Brooklyn
